eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Boundary, ID; at 12:01 AM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 4:01 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The Boundary County Sheriff's Office has issued an immediate wildfire evacuation order for the following areas in Bonners Ferry.: Turner's Hill Road from the 3000 block to highway 95. All Holmes Rd. Addresses. All Kings row road addresses and any side roads. All Fleming Creek Road addresses and any side roads. The following areas should be prepared to evacuate pending further notice.:The 3000 block of Moon Shadow Rd.Contact Boundary County Sheriff's Office for further information.
